name: Herbed Stuffed Eggs#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Spread bread crumbs on a baking sheet and bake for about 10 minutes, until dry.
2. Peel the eggs, halve them, and separate yolks from whites. Melt butter in a heavy, small skillet over low heat. Add herbs and stir until wilted, about 1 minute. Cool slightly.
3. Mash yolks in a small bowl. Stir in herb mixture. Season with salt and a generous amount of pepper.
4. Spoon herbed yolk mixture into egg whites.
5. In a shallow bowl, combine bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese. Dip the stuffed eggs first in flour, then beaten egg, rolling them thoroughly to coat in bread crumbs.
6. Refrigerate uncovered for at least 20 minutes (or prepare up to 6 hours ahead).
7. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 360°F (175°C). Fry the eggs in batches (do not crowd) until golden brown, turning occasionally, about 3-4 minutes. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with salt before serving. Combine parsley with sage, rosemary, or basil.
